title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, June 14 2022
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 14/06/2022
Image reference: 2022-06-14_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-june-14-2022_img1.png
Bulkers: Bulker values have softened
Capesize HL Pride (179,700 DWT, Oct 2016, Dalian Shipbuilding Industry Corp) sold to Global Meridian Holdings for USD 44.00 mil, VV Value USD 44.30 mil - BWTS Fitted. Capesize Rosebank (177,000 DWT, Aug 2010, New Times Shipbuilding) sold to Unknown UK for USD 27.50 mil, VV Value USD 27.78 mil. Panamax Nord Luna (82,300 DWT, Dec 2020, Jiangsu Yangzi-Mitsui) sold to unknown Greek buyers for USD 37.80 mil, VV Value USD 38.17 mil.
